commands.review_summary:
This PR adds release-only recovery and cleanup for stale local-container claims and stored SSH keys when a Docker container was removed externally, with focused tests, documentation, and an optional Docker smoke test.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current resolution returns a not-found error before release can remove a stale claim, and the added focused test models that path. A high-confidence real Docker reproduction is not included.
commands.review_followup: - Request contributor-provided real Docker proof, then complete normal maintainer review; automation cannot establish behavior in the contributor's setup.

target.title: fix(local-container): clean stale docker claims on stop
target.body:
## Summary
- allow `crabbox stop --provider docker <lease-or-slug>` to clean a stale local-container claim when the backing container was removed outside Crabbox
- keep normal resolve/status/run behavior strict when the container is missing, and preserve Docker context scoping for claim cleanup
- add an optional build-tagged local-container Docker live smoke and document how to run it

## Verification
- `env -u CRABBOX_PROVIDER -u CRABBOX_CONFIG -u CRABBOX_COORDINATOR -u CRABBOX_COORDINATOR_TOKEN -u CRABBOX_ADMIN_TOKEN go test ./internal/providers/localcontainer ./internal/cli`
- `env -u CRABBOX_PROVIDER -u CRABBOX_CONFIG -u CRABBOX_COORDINATOR -u CRABBOX_COORDINATOR_TOKEN -u CRABBOX_ADMIN_TOKEN go test ./cmd/crabbox`
- `env -u CRABBOX_PROVIDER -u CRABBOX_CONFIG -u CRABBOX_COORDINATOR -u CRABBOX_COORDINATOR_TOKEN -u CRABBOX_ADMIN_TOKEN go test -tags localcontainer ./cmd/crabbox`
- `env -u CRABBOX_PROVIDER -u CRABBOX_CONFIG -u CRABBOX_COORDINATOR -u CRABBOX_COORDINATOR_TOKEN -u CRABBOX_ADMIN_TOKEN .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Config and secrets
- no new config keys or provider names
- no secret handling changes
- optional live smoke honors `CRABBOX_LOCAL_CONTAINER_E2E_IMAGE` for selecting a faster prebuilt test image

## Screenshots
- not applicable; CLI/provider behavior only
target.author: hxy91819
